Surround the hero image with exactly 12 editorial panels and callouts: 1 top-left header strip, 3 burst badges, 1 main promo burst, 2 right-side widgets, 4 left-side player stat boxes, 1 center description, 1 feature checklist with 4 bullets, 1 speed cluster, 3 strategy panels, 4 management/review panels, and 5 footer promo slogans. Add a small portrait of a tired salaryman player avatar and a mysterious silhouette teaser in the bottom right. Make it look like a glossy chaotic game magazine review page from Japan, humorous but intense, with high readability, thick outlines, neon accents, and print-authentic texture."}
